subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath sent down unto him who hath taken the Dawning-Place of the Verses as his Succorer and who turned unto Him when the servants turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن اتخذ مشرق الایات لنفسه معینا و اقبل اذ اعرض عنه العباد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
